series_metadata.series_title: COUNTY RETURN OF TAXABLE BUSINESS PROPERTY (PERSONAL PROPERTY TAX FORM 920)
series_metadata.series_description: Tax returns and related papers, for all taxable tangible personal property (Form 920) filed by incorporated and unincorporated businesses in Delaware, Fairfield, Fayette, Franklin, Knox, Licking, Madison, Marion, Morrow, Pickaway, Ross and Union counties for the years 1984 thru 1988.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 5 fiscal years, then destroy. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: Retain for 5 fiscal years, then delete., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
